changelog: 🚑 ThorOS 1.1 — an emergency fix for first-time setup. No feature changes; 1.0 installs should read the release notes.
Fixed: setting a root password during install left your user without admin (sudo) rights — and unable to receive updates. Setup now repairs this automatically.
Fixed: NVIDIA machines silently stayed on CPU forever — the driver installed but was never activated. Setup now restarts once to activate it and then picks the right AI model for your GPU.
Already on 1.0? Run: su - , then usermod -aG sudo YOUR_USERNAME , then reboot. (No root password set? Just reboot.)
